title: Living in Boulder blog 6 - 23 - 2017: Roman Geography Book

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night life update from Boulder, covering a deal he made with his mom to sell his car and do chores in exchange for not having to manage the sale himself, a bike ride they took together, and his ongoing project mapping ancient Rome using Google Earth and a Roman geography book organized alphabetically by building name.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Wants to sell it but doesn't want to deal with the process himself; relieved mom will handle it
Excited and eager to finish it; believes the Google Earth trip visualization will be compelling
Positive about it as a daily activity and a way to make her life easier
